strategy_reasoning: Translating a UI redesign and color palette update into a literal 'painting and redecorating' narrative. Using the characters to interact with colors and UI elements makes frontend updates feel tactile and warm.
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art, soft pastel gradients, Stardew Valley aesthetic, warm ambient lighting, chunky sprites.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown stripes, black antennae, oval eyes, pink blush, a happy smile, and translucent wings, wearing a tiny painter's beret. She is painting a digital canvas with a tiny brush, splashing bright colors. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NEW PALETTE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: Polly the bee painting the new UI colors

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, hovering next to a cute chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot is holding a glowing color palette with swatches of mint, peach, and cream. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. The robot has stubby arms and excited square pixel eyes. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'COLORS!'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: Monitor robot discovering the new color system

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, watching a round tan mochi-ball creature. The creature has tiny dot eyes and a wide happy mouth, enthusiastically eating old gray UI blocks. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. The bee has her signature pink blush and translucent wings. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NOMNOM'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
images.description: Nomnom eating the deprecated drab UI code

caption:
Pushed a fresh coat of pixelated paint this week.

PR #8902 is merged, bringing a new palette system, updated scene backgrounds, and better color handling across the board. The old gray blocks have been consumed by the void (and Nomnom). Everything feels a bit warmer and softer now, like someone finally turned on the ambient lighting in the codebase.

Come look at the new colors on the site.
alt_text: A carousel of three cozy pixel art images showing Polly the bee, a monitor robot, and a round creature interacting with new color palettes, paintbrushes, and UI elements in a warm lime green and pastel environment.
